title: spergularia salina var. australis
intro: Spergularia salina var. australis is a variety of the saltwort plant, also known as a type of sand-spurrey, which is a succulent, perennial plant that thrives in salt-sprayed coastal areas. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Spergularia salina var. australis include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
